pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which creates this directory structure and populates it with task files.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where tests/test_transcript.py explicitly asserts that query_count < 10.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which defines services/transcript.py containing the generate_student_transcript function to optimize.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which generates tests/test_transcript.py for task verification.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a purely synthetic SQLite database (university.db) populated dynamically during task setup via create_db.py. The project directory is verified as /home/ga/PycharmProjects/transcript_engine. The performance constraint of fewer than 10 SQL queries is strictly enforced by tests/test_transcript.py. The target file for refactoring is services/transcript.py.
